title: vm-create-golden
description: Receipt for `testanyware vm create-golden`. Under --dry-run it carries the boot plan without mutating; on execution it identifies the created golden image.

dry_run.description: Present and true when --dry-run was set; the boot plan is described but nothing is mutated.

platform.description: Target platform. Only macos is supported today; linux/windows goldens are Tier 2.

version.description: OS version to provision (e.g. tahoe, sequoia, sonoma). Defaults to tahoe.

name.description: Golden image name. Defaults to testanyware-golden-macos-<version>.

created.description: Present and true on a successful (non-dry-run) golden creation.

boot_plan.description: Ordered boot sequence (3 normal + 2 recovery = 5 boots) that golden creation drives.

mode.description: Whether the boot is a normal boot or a macOS Recovery boot.

actions.description: Human-readable summary of what this boot performs.
